content.text:
<timestamp>Saturday, Jul 4, 2026, 4:35 PM (UTC+3:30)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Create a complete Postman Collection v2.1 JSON file at d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor\chat-day12-collection.json for workspace integration.

Collection name: "Elay Customer — Chat Module (Day 12 Integration Tests)"
baseUrl variable: http://localhost:5144

Folders (exact names):
0. Auth (Setup)
1. Home (List, Search, Create)
2. Profile
3. PV — Send, Attach, Reply, Forward, Edit, Delete
4. PV — Block & Mute (mutual block scenarios)
5. Group — Create, Members, Send, Leave, Delete Message
6. Channel — Create, Members, Send, Leave, Delete Message
7. Notification
8. SignalR Smoke Test (WebSocket, single request)

Collection variables: baseUrl, token_u1, token_u2, token_u3, token_u4, userId_u1, userId_u2, userId_u3, userId_u4, conversationId_pv, conversationId_group, conversationId_channel, messageId_u3_group, messageId_u1_group

Auth folder must have 4 login requests (U1-U4) that save tokens and userIds from GET /chat/profile after login.
Login: POST {{baseUrl}}/Auth/Login JSON body with username/password/deviceInfo.

Include ALL these contract requests with pm.test scripts:

P01-P08 PV create (folder 1 or 3)
M01,M05,M06,M07 messages (folder 3/4)
B01-B06 block group (folder 4)
H01-H05 home (folder 1)
PR01-PR04 profile (folder 2)
G01-G12 group (folder 5)
C01-C08 channel (folder 6)
PG01-PG04 pagination (folder 3 or 5)
N01-N03 notification (folder 7)
SR01 websocket (folder 8)

Key routes from codebase:
- POST /chat/conversations/pv/{targetUserId}
- POST /chat/conversations/{id}/messages (formdata text)
- GET /chat/conversations/{id}/messages
- POST/DELETE /chat/users/{id}/block
- GET /chat/conversations, GET /chat/users?search=
- GET/PUT /chat/profile (form for PUT)
- POST /chat/groups (form: name, memberUserIds)
- POST /chat/groups/{id}/members JSON {userIds:[]}
- DELETE /chat/groups/{id}/members/{userId}
- POST /chat/channels (form: name, handle, memberUserIds)
- POST /chat/channels/{id}/members
- POST /chat/conversations/{id}/leave
- DELETE /chat/messages/{messageId}
- POST /chat/conversations/{id}/mute JSON {isMuted:true/false}
- GET /Notification?PageIndex=0&PageSize=20

Error strings to assert:
- "شناسه کاربر نامعتبر است"
- "امکان گفتگو با خودتان وجود ندارد" (Chat.CannotChatWithYourself)
- "مکالمه یافت نشد"
- "پیام نمی‌تواند خالی باشد"
- "امکان ارسال پیام به این کاربر وجود ندارد" (UserBlocked)
- "شما عضو این مکالمه نیستید" (likely M07)
- "نام گروه الزامی است"
- "حداقل یک عضو باید انتخاب شود"
- "فقط مدیر گروه مجاز به این عملیات است"
- "اعضای کانال اجازه ارسال پیام ندارند"
- "حداقل یک فیلد برای ویرایش الزامی است"
- "نام نباید بیشتر از ۱۰۰ کاراکتر باشد"
- "این شناسه کانال قبلاً ثبت شده است"

Use Bearer {{token_u1}} etc per scenario. P01 saves conversationId_pv. G01 saves conversationId_group. C01 saves conversationId_channel.

Return only confirmation when file is written. Keep JSON valid for Postman createCollection API.
</user_query>

I'll build the Postman collection from the chat API routes and contract tests in the codebase.

[REDACTED]

semantic_query: chat endpoint conversations messages groups channels
chat endpoint conversations messages groups channels

content.text:
Building the Postman collection JSON with a generator script so all contract scenarios are included.

[REDACTED]

input.command: rtk node -e "const c=require('d:/Elay_Backend-master/.cursor/chat-day12-collection.json'); console.log('valid', c.info.name); const count=(items)=>items.reduce((n,i)=>n+1+(i.item?count(i.item):0),0); console.log('requests', count(c.item)); const ids=[]; const walk=(items)=>items.forEach(i=>{if(i.request){const m=i.name.match(/^([A-Z0-9]+)/); if(m) ids.push(m[1]);} if(i.item) walk(i.item);}); walk(c.item); console.log('contract ids', ids.sort().join(', '));"
input.description: Validate JSON and count contract requests

input.command: rtk powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor\gen-chat-day12-collection.ps1" ; rtk node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('d:/Elay_Backend-master/.cursor/chat-day12-collection.json','utf8')); console.log('JSON OK');"
input.description: Regenerate collection and validate JSON parse

input.final_summary: Postman Collection v2.1 written to `.cursor/chat-day12-collection.json` with all Day 12 contract scenarios (P01–P08, M01/M05–M07, B01–B06, H01–H05, PR01–PR04, G01–G12, C01–C08, PG01–PG04, N01–N03, SR01), 8 folders, collection variables, and pm.test scripts.
